response.justification: Bogdan is a skilled and versatile software engineer with ~17 years of experience across web, embedded, and infrastructure domains, and recent exposure to AI-agent tooling (MCP frameworks, agentic workflows) at re:cinq. However, the role demands a director-level individual contributor with recognized, demonstrable AI expertise—ideally a post-graduate AI credential and a track record of shipping AI-powered products or platforms at scale. His AI involvement appears recent and infrastructure-adjacent rather than strategy-defining. There is no evidence of enterprise advisory experience, technical thought leadership at the industry level, or the cloud-platform depth (at scale) this role requires. The seniority and strategic scope of this position exceed what his resume demonstrates.
strengths: 17+ years of continuous software engineering experience spanning embedded, web, mobile, and distributed systems—satisfying the minimum experience threshold
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) at re:cinq showing current engagement with the AI space
Founder and open-source platform builder (GISCollective) demonstrating entrepreneurial initiative and product ownership
concerns: No advanced degree in AI or a related field and no history of shipping recognized AI products or platforms—falling short of every preferred qualification
No evidence of director-level scope: strategic customer advisory, cross-organizational technical leadership, or industry-level thought leadership
Cloud expertise is shallow (AWS CDK in one role, Kubernetes for a side project) with no demonstrated depth in cloud-platform architecture or AI-platform strategy at enterprise scale
